message:
fix: remove rig from daemon.json patrol config on dock/remove

When a rig is decommissioned via `gt rig dock` or `gt rig remove`, it
was not being removed from the daemon.json witness.rigs and
refinery.rigs arrays. This caused the daemon to keep spawning
witness/refinery sessions for non-existent rigs on every heartbeat.

Add RemoveRigFromDaemonPatrols() (mirrors AddRigToDaemonPatrols) and
call it from both runRigDock and runRigRemove. Also re-add the rig
on undock so daemon resumes managing it.

Fixes: gt-s3lyt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
